title: Charm Fixer
description: Disables some modules on charm to fix incompatbility issues with owo
body:
Fixes an issue with Charm and owo Lib by disabling PortableCrafting, InventoryTidying, and CoreClient(InventoryButtonManager) modules within Charm the mod

GitHub Issue Report: [Link](https://github.com/svenhjol/Charm/issues/878)
